title: Handpainted Shoes
shortDescription: Custom handpainted footwear — one-of-one wearable art.
longStory: Original handpainted shoes by Giuseppe Fioretti. A wearable piece where painting meets everyday object.

title: Blue Study · Eye
shortDescription: Handpainted blue study with eye motif on paper.
longStory: Ink and colour on paper — a handpainted study exploring line, blue and the gaze.

title: Drawing · Grid
shortDescription: Ink on paper — grid study exploring texture and repetition.
longStory: Ink on paper — a drawing study exploring texture, repetition and the body as material.

title: Eyes
shortDescription: Handpainted study exploring gaze and perception.
longStory: A painting piece by Giuseppe Fioretti — available as an original or limited print on request.

title: Tutti in Uno
shortDescription: Mixed media painting by Giuseppe Fioretti.
longStory: An original artwork — form, colour and composition on canvas.

title: Pee Pee
longStory: A selected piece from Giuseppe Fioretti's painting practice.
